rationale: The postcondition requires proving SMT-level Vec<u8> equality (r1 == r2) from view equality (r1@ == v@ && r2@ == v@). Verus's Vec model lacks any axiom bridging view equality to Vec equality (verified with minimal test cases including empty Vecs and `=~=` / `=~~=` operators, all failed). Without assume() this implication is not provable since two distinct Vec values may share the same Seq view in Verus's SMT model. lemma_vec_obeys_view_eq relates eq_spec (PartialEq) to view, not SMT `==`.
